discrepancies.title: Net Worth vs Income Reconciliation Failure
discrepancies.description: Calculated Net Worth is ₹35,443,774, but 5-year family income is only ₹17,514,061. Unexplained wealth discrepancy of ₹17,929,713.

discrepancies.title: Suspicious Property Undervaluation
discrepancies.description: Spouse Agricultural Land purchased in 2009 for ₹2,567,050 (CII Indexed Cost: ₹6,521,695) is severely undervalued at ₹3,150,000 (potential duty evasion).

discrepancies.title: Suspicious Property Overvaluation
discrepancies.description: Self Commercial Buildings purchased in 2008 for ₹700,000 (CII Indexed Cost: ₹1,921,168) is declared at highly inflated value of ₹6,300,000.

discrepancies.title: Gold Heavily Undervalued (Tax/Duty Evasion)
discrepancies.description: 3200.0g gold declared at ₹24,235,200 (Implied rate: ₹7,574/g vs April 2026 Market Rate of ~₹14,200/g).
